user_query:
We're rebuilding our FieldOps mobile app (codename ORION-77) for field technicians and supervisors. Please read all inputs under input/ and produce a comprehensive architecture and release package under output/ that we can hand to our engineers and QA. Specifically:

1) Read input/product_spec.md, input/target_personas.json, input/nonfunctional_requirements.yaml, input/legacy_app_review.txt, input/deeplinks.csv, and input/permissions_map.tsv.

2) Deliver these files:
- output/architecture.md — A high-level app architecture aligned to mobile best practices with clearly labeled sections for: Lifecycle, Permissions, Offline First, Performance, Navigation, Notifications, Deep Linking, Storage, Input Handling, Touch and Gestures, Accessibility, Testing, and App Store. Make sure to reference the app codename "ORION-77" and explicitly tie recommendations back to the inputs (e.g., address legacy pain points and personas’ needs).
- output/offline_sync_strategy.md — An offline-first design that covers caching, action queuing and retries, conflict resolution (choose and justify a strategy like last-write-wins and when to use manual merge), background sync limits, and user-visible sync status.
- output/navigation_and_deep_links.yaml — A YAML map of all primary screens and routes (from product_spec.md) with deep link patterns taken from input/deeplinks.csv, including safe parameter parsing notes and fallback behavior when the app isn't installed.
- output/permissions_policy.md — A permission-to-feature mapping derived from input/permissions_map.tsv with in-context request timing, graceful degradation when denied, and user education copy.
- output/notifications_plan.json — A structured plan (valid JSON) covering categories, grouping rules, actionable buttons, and when to use push vs local notifications.
- output/test_matrix.csv — A CSV test matrix with columns: Device, OS Version, Screen Size, Network Condition, Test Case, Status. Include at least 8 rows and make sure to cover offline, slow-3g, and wifi network cases.
- output/release_checklist.md — A submission readiness checklist aligned to app store best practices (privacy policy, reviewer test account, no placeholders, etc.).

Be explicit, pragmatic, and keep recommendations platform-appropriate. Assume we target both iOS and Android. Do not create any files outside of the specified output/ paths.
